auth.login_subtitle: Wọle lati tesiwaju iriri gigun ti o dara julọ.
auth.register_subtitle: Gba irin-ajo ti o dara ati ailewu.
auth.agree_to_terms: Mo gba gbogbo Awọn ofin ati Imulo Aṣiri
auth.invalid_phone: Jọwọ tẹ nọmba foonu to tọ.
auth.reset_password_subtitle: Tẹ nọmba foonu ti o sopọ mọ akọọlẹ rẹ a yoo fi koodu atunto ranṣẹ si ọ.
auth.remember_password: Ṣe o ranti ọrọ igbaniwọle rẹ?
auth.otp_subtitle: Tẹ koodu OTP nọmba 6 ti a fi ranṣẹ si ọ.
auth.invalid_otp: Jọwọ tẹ koodu nọmba 6 to tọ.
auth.create_new_password_subtitle: Yan ọrọ igbaniwọle ailewu ti iwọ yoo ranti.
auth.password_too_short: Ọrọ igbaniwọle gbọdọ ni o kere ju awọn ohun kikọ 6.

onboarding.slide1_title:
Kaabọ si chauffly
Rin pẹlu Igboya
onboarding.slide1_description: Gbadun awọn gigun ti o dara julọ, awọn awakọ ti o gbẹkẹle, ati iriri irin-ajo ti a ṣe ni ayika itunu ati aabo.
onboarding.slide2_title: Igbadun, Nigbakugba Ti O Ba Nilo Rẹ
onboarding.slide2_description: Yan lati Go, Plus, Luxe, tabi Black — awọn gigun ti a ṣe ni pipe fun gbogbo akoko, lati awọn iṣẹ ojoojumọ si irin-ajo alaṣẹ.
onboarding.slide3_title: Aabo Rẹ Ni Pataki Julọ Fun Wa
onboarding.slide3_description: Awọn awakọ ti a ṣe ayẹwo, titọpa ni akoko gidi, idanimọ oju, ati pinpin lẹsẹkẹsẹ jẹ ki gbogbo irin-ajo wa ni aabo.
